key.name: tiling-enabled
key.description: Whether automatic tiling is active

key.name: show-indicator
key.description: Show the HyperGnome indicator in the top panel

key.name: inner-gap
key.description: Gap between tiled windows in pixels

key.name: outer-gap
key.description: Gap between tiled windows and screen edges in pixels

key.name: split-ratio
key.description: Default ratio when splitting a window (0.1 - 0.9)

key.name: resize-step
key.description: Amount to change split ratio per resize keypress (0.01 - 0.25)

key.name: layout-mode
key.description: Active tiling algorithm: 'dwindle' (BSP) or 'master' (master + stack)

key.name: master-orientation
key.description: Which side of the screen the master window occupies (master layout only)

key.name: master-factor
key.description: Fraction of the work area occupied by the master window (0.1 – 0.9)

key.name: active-border-size
key.description: Width of the active window border in pixels

key.name: active-border-color
key.description: CSS color for the active window border

key.name: active-border-radius
key.description: Corner radius of the active window border in pixels

key.name: dim-inactive
key.description: Desaturate unfocused windows for visual emphasis on the active window

key.name: dim-strength
key.description: How much to desaturate inactive windows (0.0 - 1.0)

key.name: active-border-color-secondary
key.description: Second color for gradient border (empty = solid color)

key.name: active-border-gradient-angle
key.description: Angle of the border gradient in degrees

key.name: active-border-gradient-speed
key.description: Speed of gradient rotation in degrees per frame (0 = static)

key.name: animation-enabled
key.description: Enable smooth window open/close and tiling animations

key.name: focus-pulse
key.description: Brief scale pulse on the border when focus changes

key.name: animation-duration
key.description: Duration of tiling and window animations in milliseconds (50 - 500)

key.name: float-list
key.description: List of WM_CLASS values that should always float

key.name: override-gnome-shortcuts
key.description: When enabled, HyperGnome takes over GNOME shortcuts that conflict with its defaults (e.g. Super+H, Super+1-9). Required for default HyperGnome bindings to work. Turn off if you prefer to use GNOME's native shortcuts and rebind HyperGnome's manually.

key.name: tile-focus-left
key.description: Move keyboard focus to the nearest window on the left

key.name: tile-focus-down
key.description: Move keyboard focus to the nearest window below

key.name: tile-focus-up
key.description: Move keyboard focus to the nearest window above

key.name: tile-focus-right
key.description: Move keyboard focus to the nearest window on the right

key.name: tile-move-left
key.description: Swap the focused window with its left neighbor

key.name: tile-move-down
key.description: Swap the focused window with its neighbor below

key.name: tile-move-up
key.description: Swap the focused window with its neighbor above

key.name: tile-move-right
key.description: Swap the focused window with its right neighbor

key.name: tile-toggle-float
key.description: Toggle the focused window between tiled and floating

key.name: tile-close-window
key.description: Close the focused window

key.name: tile-toggle-split
key.description: Toggle the split direction of the parent container

key.name: tile-equalize
key.description: Reset all split ratios on the current workspace to 50/50

key.name: tile-swap-master
key.description: Swap the focused window with the master window

key.name: tile-focus-master
key.description: Move keyboard focus to the master window

key.name: tile-cycle-orientation
key.description: Cycle master orientation: left → right → top → bottom

key.name: tile-resize-left
key.description: Grow the focused window to the left

key.name: tile-resize-down
key.description: Grow the focused window downward

key.name: tile-resize-up
key.description: Grow the focused window upward

key.name: tile-resize-right
key.description: Grow the focused window to the right

key.name: tile-workspace-1
key.description: Activate workspace 1 (Hyprland-style direct workspace jump)

key.name: tile-workspace-2
key.description: Activate workspace 2

key.name: tile-workspace-3
key.description: Activate workspace 3

key.name: tile-workspace-4
key.description: Activate workspace 4

key.name: tile-workspace-5
key.description: Activate workspace 5

key.name: tile-workspace-6
key.description: Activate workspace 6

key.name: tile-workspace-7
key.description: Activate workspace 7

key.name: tile-workspace-8
key.description: Activate workspace 8

key.name: tile-workspace-9
key.description: Activate workspace 9

key.name: tile-workspace-10
key.description: Activate workspace 10

key.name: tile-move-to-workspace-1
key.description: Move the focused window to workspace 1

key.name: tile-move-to-workspace-2
key.description: Move the focused window to workspace 2

key.name: tile-move-to-workspace-3
key.description: Move the focused window to workspace 3

key.name: tile-move-to-workspace-4
key.description: Move the focused window to workspace 4

key.name: tile-move-to-workspace-5
key.description: Move the focused window to workspace 5

key.name: tile-move-to-workspace-6
key.description: Move the focused window to workspace 6

key.name: tile-move-to-workspace-7
key.description: Move the focused window to workspace 7

key.name: tile-move-to-workspace-8
key.description: Move the focused window to workspace 8

key.name: tile-move-to-workspace-9
key.description: Move the focused window to workspace 9

key.name: tile-move-to-workspace-10
key.description: Move the focused window to workspace 10

key.name: tile-workspace-prev
key.description: Activate the workspace before the current one (clamps at the first workspace)

key.name: tile-workspace-next
key.description: Activate the workspace after the current one (clamps at the last workspace)

key.name: tile-move-workspace-prev
key.description: Move the focused window to the previous workspace and follow

key.name: tile-move-workspace-next
key.description: Move the focused window to the next workspace and follow

key.name: stashed-switch-to-application-1
key.description: Internal — original accelerator for switch-to-application-1, saved while the override toggle is on. Do not edit by hand.

key.name: stashed-switch-to-application-2
key.description: Internal — original accelerator for switch-to-application-2, saved while the override toggle is on. Do not edit by hand.

key.name: stashed-switch-to-application-3
key.description: Internal — original accelerator for switch-to-application-3, saved while the override toggle is on. Do not edit by hand.

key.name: stashed-switch-to-application-4
key.description: Internal — original accelerator for switch-to-application-4, saved while the override toggle is on. Do not edit by hand.

key.name: stashed-switch-to-application-5
key.description: Internal — original accelerator for switch-to-application-5, saved while the override toggle is on. Do not edit by hand.

key.name: stashed-switch-to-application-6
key.description: Internal — original accelerator for switch-to-application-6, saved while the override toggle is on. Do not edit by hand.

key.name: stashed-switch-to-application-7
key.description: Internal — original accelerator for switch-to-application-7, saved while the override toggle is on. Do not edit by hand.

key.name: stashed-switch-to-application-8
key.description: Internal — original accelerator for switch-to-application-8, saved while the override toggle is on. Do not edit by hand.

key.name: stashed-switch-to-application-9
key.description: Internal — original accelerator for switch-to-application-9, saved while the override toggle is on. Do not edit by hand.
